title: Large array initialisation produces invalid C++

features.name: wide_packed_array_with_deep_unpacked_array_default_init
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array with depth greater than 256 elements and packed width exceeding 64 bits, initialized with default-value syntax

features.name: unpacked_array_depth_exceeds_256
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array declaration with depth greater than 256 elements

features.name: packed_array_width_exceeds_64_bits
features.description: Code should include a packed array or logic vector with width exceeding 64 bits

features.name: default_value_array_initialization
features.description: Code should include a default-value array initialization using the '{default: '0} syntax on a multi-dimensional array
